title: ChiptuneCraft!
description: Bitcrushes all music & sound effects in the game!
body:
Do y'all remember the 3D Shareware V1.34 update? Remember how everything sounded so _crunchy?_

Well with this resource pack bitcrushes all sound effects & music in the game for a "retro" style/feel!

**Please go to the "versions" tab to download either the Music pack or Sound effects pack (which is currently unfinished)**

I recommend playing this with funnyboy-roks' 8-Bit resource pack :3

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/2d8JVdtVwTE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
